# Generated by iptables-save v1.8.10 (nf_tables)
# Redirects standard SSH/Telnet ports to Cowrie's high ports so the
# honeypot can run unprivileged while listening on the expected 22/23.
*nat
:PREROUTING ACCEPT [22:1741]
:INPUT ACCEPT [22:1741]
:OUTPUT ACCEPT [586:46465]
:POSTROUTING ACCEPT [586:46465]
-A PREROUTING -p tcp -m tcp --dport 23 -j REDIRECT --to-ports 2223
-A PREROUTING -p tcp -m tcp --dport 22 -j REDIRECT --to-ports 2222
COMMIT
